message:
feat(fwc): add replay, compare, undo, approvals commands with 31 tests

Implements 4 new CLI commands for history UX (beads 28.2-28.5):
- replay: re-execute operations from history with --set overrides, dry-run preview
- compare: diff two history entries across 7 fields with classification
- undo: check reversibility via UndoRegistry, --execute/--force flags
- approvals: list/filter/view ApprovalArtifact files with status/connector filters

Also adds command family classification (readiness.rs) and readonly
markers (recovery.rs) for all 4 commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
